## 4. Escalation and Delays

Any delays or escalations must be documented with reasons and actions taken. If a clearance is blocked, notify management and compliance immediately.

## 5. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

This tracker is maintained in Abu Dhabi and governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates and the Emirate of Abu Dhabi.
